description: Capability set for the Indigo-only desktop alternate UX window. The Meetings page self-fetches calendar data via the app's meetings_* commands directly (meetings_list_upcoming, meetings_list_scheduled_bots, meetings_list_accounts, meetings_list_calendars_for_account, meetings_list_memberships) — same as the standalone meetings-window. These are app-registered Tauri commands authorized by core:default (custom commands are not gated by per-command permission identifiers in this ACL, only plugins are), so no allow-meetings-* tokens exist or are added.
